May Emerald Necklace

Regular price $170.00 USD
Sale price $170.00 USD Regular price
Unit price /  per 

The May Emerald Necklace is a timeless classic that embodies elegance and sophistication.

 

All product imagery has been kindly provided by Katy Faye

30 days returns

Free shipping

1 year warranty

Hurry, only 10 items left in stock!
Summer Flash Sales

The sales will end in

266D | 04H | 40M | 54S
This item is a deferred, subscription, or recurring purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted.

Pickup available at New York Warehouse

Usually ready in 24 hours
Detail & Specs

Crafted in precious metals or plated finishes with optional stones or pearls, each piece is nickel-free where possible. Dimensions, chain lengths, and closures vary by design and are noted per style.

Shipping & Returns

Most orders ship within 1–2 business days with tracked delivery; timing depends on your location and carrier. Unworn items in original packaging can be returned within the stated return window. Personalized or final-sale pieces aren’t eligible for return.

Quality & Care

Store jewelry separately in a soft pouch or box to avoid scratches. Keep away from water, perfume, lotions, and cleaning chemicals, and remove before showering, swimming, or exercise. Gently polish with a soft, lint-free cloth after wear.

Unique features of our products
Design With Purpose
Crafted by Artisans
Made to Last
Design With Purpose

Every collection at Poetic begins with a story — sometimes whispered from generations past, sometimes sparked by a modern moment. We draw from memory, emotion, architecture, and the quiet grace of everyday life. Our design philosophy is rooted in meaning, not trends. Each sketch reflects intention and individuality, crafted to speak to your personal narrative.
Crafted by Artisans

True beauty takes time — and human hands. Our pieces are brought to life by master artisans, each one deeply experienced in time-honored techniques passed down through generations. From wax sculpting and goldsmithing to intricate hand-setting, every stage of our process is executed with care and precision. No shortcuts. No mass production. Just skilled craftsmanship and soul.
Made to Last

Jewelry should be more than momentary — it should be enduring. That’s why we use only premium, responsibly sourced materials that age gracefully with wear. Our commitment to longevity means every Poetic piece is made to be cherished for decades, evolving with you and becoming part of your legacy. This is jewelry you’ll love today, and treasure forever.
